description: Sweetspot provides an AI platform for government contractors to find opportunities, manage pursuits, and draft proposal responses. Its public site and user guide describe product features such as search, pipeline management, and proposal copilot.
summary: sweetspot.so publicly exposes product/user documentation and a docs-hosted placeholder OpenAPI file, but no verifiable developer integration surface on sweetspot.so or its subdomains was found beyond that non-production sample spec.
